input: Run governance framework on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected governance framework output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the governance framework workflow

input: Apply governance framework to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive governance framework analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to governance framework

input: Run governance framework but I have no files or documentation yet
expected_behavior: Skill handles gracefully — requests minimum viable input or produces gap analysis

input: Apply governance framework but requirements contradict each other
expected_behavior: Skill detects contradiction, flags with [OPEN] tag, proposes resolution
